title: Outlook Automation Cannot See Mirrored Columns
excerpt: I am attempting to build an automation where emails are sent to addresses displayed in a mirrored column. The outlook automation can only see non-mirrored columns that are on the board. I would like to request this featu…

posts.author: hambypete (Pete Hamby)
posts.cookedHtml: I am attempting to build an automation where emails are sent to addresses displayed in a mirrored column. The outlook automation can only see non-mirrored columns that are on the board. I would like to request this feature. Thanks!

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: I also want this for gmail Integration and automations please. Huge timesaver to keep emails only in one board and mirror them to all the boards we need it for

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hambypete & @kjur

Have a search for ‘Column Magic’ in the monday.com app marketplace.
With this, you can ‘copy’ what is in the mirror column (your email addresses) and paste it into a more appropriate and automation friendly column for you to set up your workflows as described.

Let me know how you get on!
peta@upstreamtech.io
upstream
